seo.title: WunPlae — AI-Powered Manga & Webtoon Translation
seo.description: Translate manga and webtoons automatically with AI. Detect text, OCR, inpaint, translate, and render — all in one tool.

hero.subhead: Automatically detect, remove, and replace text in manga and comics — preserving the original art. Supports 30+ languages.

s1.title: 1. Upload
s1.desc: Drop your manga pages (supports batch upload for better context)

s2.title: 2. AI Translates
s2.desc: Our pipeline detects text, removes it cleanly, translates, and renders new text

s3.title: 3. Edit & Export
s3.desc: Fine-tune translations in the built-in editor, then download

steps.name: Text Detection
steps.desc: AI locates every text bubble and sound effect using DBNET/CTD/CRAFT models

steps.name: OCR Recognition
steps.desc: Reads the original text with specialized manga OCR models

steps.name: Smart Inpainting
steps.desc: Removes original text and reconstructs the background art seamlessly (LaMa AI)

steps.name: AI Translation
steps.desc: Translates with context awareness using GPT-4o — understands manga dialogue, slang, and tone

steps.name: Text Rendering
steps.desc: Places translated text with matched font size, color, and position

items.title: Visual Text Editor
items.desc: Adjust font, size, color, position, alignment, bold/italic, text stroke for every text block

items.title: Magic Remover
items.desc: Paint over leftover text or artifacts and AI inpaints them away

items.title: Manual Translate
items.desc: Select a missed region and run AI translation on just that area

items.title: Clone Stamp
items.desc: Pixel-level background repair by cloning from nearby areas

items.title: Pen & Eraser
items.desc: Freehand drawing for annotations or touch-ups

items.title: Batch Export
items.desc: Download single images or all pages as ZIP

items.title: Organize by Project
items.desc: Group manga chapters into projects (up to 5 active)

items.title: Batch Translation
items.desc: Upload multiple pages and translate all at once

items.title: Context-Aware AI
items.desc: Multi-page upload helps AI understand story context for more accurate translations

items.title: Cloud Storage
items.desc: Results saved with auto-expiry, accessible from any device

items.title: Auto-Save
items.desc: Edits saved automatically as you work

pricing.title: Choose the Right Plan for You
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you need more tools and tokens.

trust.title: Trust & Security
items: httpOnly cookie auth — tokens never exposed to JavaScript
Sentry error monitoring — issues caught and resolved fast
GPU-powered workers — fast translation even at high resolution

footer.cta: Translate your first 5 pages free — no credit card required.
footer.langs: Supported Languages: Thai, English, Japanese, Chinese (Simplified), Korean — and 25+ more

login.confirmationSent: We sent a confirmation link to
login.verifyEmail: Please verify your email to sign in.
login.pwRuleAsciiOnly: English characters only (no Thai or other scripts)

home.noProjectsDesc: Create a project to start translating manga
home.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this project?
home.maxProjects: Maximum 5 active projects. Please delete an old project first.
home.welcomeDesc: Translate 5 manga images for free — create your first project to get started!

project.dropDesc: Supports batch upload and Ctrl+V clipboard paste
project.dropHint: Uploading multiple images together helps AI understand context better and translate more accurately
project.warning: Higher resolution improves OCR accuracy but increases processing time.
project.insufficientTokens: Insufficient tokens. You need {need} token(s) but have {have}. Please top up.
project.hintTextDetector: Model used to detect text regions in the image
project.hintResolution: Detection resolution — higher is more accurate but slower
project.hintRenderDir: Text render direction: auto, horizontal, or vertical
project.hintInpainter: Model used to remove original text: Lama Large (fast) or SDXL (high quality, requires more VRAM)
project.hintBoxThreshold: Confidence threshold for text box detection — higher is stricter
project.hintUnclipRatio: Text box expansion ratio — higher gives larger boxes
project.hintMaskDilation: Mask dilation around text — higher removes more surrounding area
project.hintInpaintingSize: Resolution used for text removal inpainting
project.hintSkipOutsideBubble: Skip removing and translating text outside speech bubbles (e.g. sound effects on artwork)

topup.paymentNote: Tokens are credited instantly after payment.
topup.scanQrDesc: Open your banking app and scan this PromptPay QR code.
topup.tokensCredited: Tokens have been credited to your account.

profile.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

tokenUsage.title: Token Usage
tokenUsage.emptyDesc: When you translate images or top up tokens, your transactions will appear here.

subscription.title: Subscription & Top-Up
subscription.topUpDesc: Purchase additional tokens on top of your subscription

editor.clickToEdit: Click a text block to edit its properties
editor.confirmClearDrawing: Clear all drawings on this image?
editor.hintFont: Font used to render the translated text
editor.hintAlignment: Text alignment: left, center, or right
editor.hintTextBorder: Outline around text, improves readability on similar-colored backgrounds
editor.hintPosition: X, Y position of the text block on the image
editor.hintSize: Width and height of the text block
editor.manualTranslateHint: Draw a rectangle around untranslated text, then click "Translate" to translate just that region.
editor.noTextDetected: No text detected in the selected region
editor.cloneStampHint: Alt+click to set source, then paint to copy pixels.
editor.guideStep2: Click & drag to paint over text
editor.guideTip: Best for removing SFX over detailed backgrounds
